allow: PowerShell(& "C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS chronovault CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci; SHOW DATABASES;")

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\xampp\\htdocs\\ChronoVault"; $p = Start-Process php -ArgumentList "artisan","serve","--port=8000" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $html = \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8000/admin/login" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Stop-Process $p.Id -Force; if \($html -match "Anmelden|anmelden"\) { "GERMAN UI: OK" } else { "GERMAN UI: NOT FOUND" }; if \($html -match "ChronoVault"\) { "BRANDING: OK" } else { "BRANDING: NOT FOUND" }; if \($html -match "dark"\) { "DARK MODE MARKUP: OK" })
